recommendation.title: Single-Leg Call — Slight OTM, Enter Post-Earnings
recommendation.entryNote: ⚠️ Earnings May 5 after close — enter AFTER to avoid IV crush. IV ~35%, expected to compress post-event. Watch for: Q1 AI revenue update vs. $3.25B full-year target, hyperscaler commentary.

companyOverview: Dominant AI data center networking vendor supplying high-speed Ethernet switches to hyperscalers (Microsoft, Meta). Doubled AI networking revenue target to $3.25B for 2026. VESPA campus mobility platform expanding addressable market. Q1 2026 guidance: ~$2.6B revenue, 62–63% gross margin. Stock up 40% in April driven by AI networking momentum.

financials.note: Elevated pre-earnings; watch for crush post May 5

catalysts: Q1 2026 earnings May 5 — AI revenue update vs. $3.25B full-year target
Hyperscaler capex cycle continuing: Microsoft, Meta, Google all expanding AI data centers
Doubled AI networking revenue target shows massive demand visibility
JP Morgan raised target to $200; Susquehanna expects 25%+ YoY revenue upside
VESPA campus mobility expanding TAM beyond data centers
risks: Nvidia entering Ethernet switch market — direct competitive threat to core product
Customer concentration: a few large hyperscalers dominate revenue
IV crush post-earnings if guidance is in-line vs. elevated expectations
HPE (post-Juniper) and Cisco increasing competitive intensity
AI capex cycle could slow if hyperscalers hit ROI pressure
dilution: No significant dilution concern. Mature cash-generative business with strong buyback history.
